title: Oakleaf
description: A fun modpack created by EayorSMP with the intent of inspiring creativity in a way that's reminiscent of games like Stardew Valley and Animal Crossing.
body:
![A screenshot of a modded Minecraft world, with text stating "EayorSMP: Oakleaf"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/227d319ef0387b6efd249da1c317e124fb0aebc0.png)
# Oakleaf
Welcome to Oakleaf! This is a project I created with my partner for a survival series together, and it evolved into something much larger, I hope you all enjoy playing it.

This Vanilla+ modpack has a primary focus on creativity, building, farming and exploration; and is supported by a plethora of light mods that are sure to run smoothly on any computer!

## Live out all your Minecraft life-sim dreams in Oakleaf!
![A screenshot of the inside of a café featuring illustrated characters.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03d29e6bf4c52bdc061c3ab2d9753126105267cd.png)

Here is out first teaser for Oakleaf!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IwSi8zSxDyM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
